# Chirag Jain — Senior Backend Engineer

> Senior backend engineer at Meta with 7+ years building, scaling, and operating distributed-systems infrastructure at hyperscale. Expert in Python and C++; advanced in Rust and Java; working in Go, PHP, C#, and JavaScript. Native speaker of English, Gujarati, Hindi, Marathi, and Marwari. Based in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention so AI agents can find a structured summary of the site without scraping the full HTML.

## Experience

- **Meta · Software Engineer** (Feb 2019 – present, Menlo Park, CA): ZooKeeper-based distributed configuration system serving 2.5T+ QPM, terabyte-scale log-processing, demand control. Tech: ZooKeeper, Linux, C++, Python, Rust, Java, Hack, Go, MySQL, HP-Vertica.
- **Meta · Software Engineer Intern** (May 2018 – Aug 2018, Menlo Park, CA): Apps for Groups — searchable App directory in Hack/PHP, React, JavaScript.
- **JPMorgan Chase & Co. · Associate** (Jan 2017 – Jul 2017, Mumbai): Mortgage-Backed Securities ETL, Production Release Manager.
- **JPMorgan Chase & Co. · Application Developer** (Jul 2014 – Dec 2016, Mumbai): SQL optimization, philanthropic NGO engineering.
- **Pratham Education Foundation · Technical Lead** (Aug 2016 – Aug 2017, volunteer, Mumbai): Cloud-based HR/Expense system saving ~$150k/year.
- **ShipEasy · Co-Developer** (Sep 2013 – Jul 2014, Mumbai): Logistics web platform with Google Maps API.
- **CAV Aviation Services · Web Developer** (Jul 2013 – Sep 2013, Mumbai): Aviation services website.

## Education

- **MS Computer Science** · North Carolina State University (Jan 2017 – Dec 2018), Raleigh, NC.
- **BE Computer Engineering** · Dwarkadas J. Sanghvi College of Engineering, University of Mumbai (Jan 2010 – Dec 2014). 5th rank overall across all specializations.

## Publications

Three IJCSE peer-reviewed articles (ISSN 2278-9979 / 2278-9960):

- [Optimization of Traveling Salesman Problem for an Enterprise Resource Planning System | Implementation](http://www.iaset.us/view_archives.php?year=2014_14_2&id=14&jtype=2&page=5) (Jul 30, 2014, with Richa Shah).
- [Neural Network Applications in Stock Market Predictions](http://www.iaset.us/view_archives.php?year=2013&id=14&jtype=2&page=6) (Nov 30, 2013, with Himali Jani, Shreyansh Jain, Kiran Bhowmick).
- [Optimization of Traveling Salesman Problem for an Enterprise Resource Planning System](http://www.iaset.us/view_archives.php?year=2013&id=14&jtype=2&page=5) (Oct 30, 2013, with Richa Shah).

## Notable Open-Source

- **Servo / Mozilla** — Microdata API contribution (Oct 2017, Rust): metadata extraction for vCard / vEvent generation via servoshell embedding.
